fields.Name: iMIS
fields.Description: iMIS EMS (Advanced Solutions International) REST API connector for associations and nonprofits. Supports parties, memberships, events, fundraising, invoicing, and commerce via iMIS's uniform 9-endpoint REST pattern.

fields.Name: Party
fields.Description: Individual + Organization unified record. Use PartyType discriminator.

fields.Name: Event
fields.Description: Events in iMIS with schedule, location, and registration information.

fields.Name: GiftInformationBatch
fields.Description: Batches of gift information for fundraising posting.

fields.Name: TributeType
fields.Description: Tribute type lookup (in memory of, in honor of).

fields.Name: Invoice
fields.Description: Invoices with line items and balances.

fields.Name: PaymentMethod
fields.Description: Payment method definitions (credit card, ACH, check).

fields.Name: DocumentSummary
fields.Description: Document metadata summary (list endpoint; use /Document for content).

fields.Name: BOEntityDefinition
fields.Description: Customer-defined Business Object (BO) definitions. Used for runtime custom entity discovery.

fields.Name: Cart
fields.Description: Shopping cart sessions for e-commerce checkout.
